evidence: The NBS release reports 2021 household consumption from a national household sample survey.
source_authority: National Bureau of Statistics of China

evidence: The survey publishes eight groups, combining food with tobacco and alcohol and combining education with culture and recreation.
source_authority: National Bureau of Statistics of China

evidence: The values are collected through a household income and expenditure survey and cannot be substituted for national-accounts S14/P31 expenditure.
source_authority: National Bureau of Statistics of China

evidence: The yearbook table inventory was not structurally confirmed.
source_authority: National Bureau of Statistics of China

evidence: The input-output benchmark described in the 2022 yearbook is 2020, not 2021.
source_authority: National Bureau of Statistics of China

evidence: The input-output source is product-oriented and does not expose a COICOP purpose dimension; conversion would require allocation.
source_authority: National Bureau of Statistics of China

evidence: The final 2021 GDP verification publishes official current-price national-accounts aggregates.
source_authority: National Bureau of Statistics of China

evidence: A 2021 twelve-purpose national-accounts table was not conclusively assessed in this run.
source_authority: National Bureau of Statistics of China

evidence: The survey combines food, tobacco and alcohol, so CP02 and narcotics cannot be isolated without an allocation.
source_authority: National Bureau of Statistics of China

evidence: The complete critical Chinese source chain was not validated in this run.
